description: You are a field robotics engineer preparing a Pioneer 3-AT robot simulation for agricultural terrain navigation research. Configure the robot's Physics mass to 12.5 kg and the WorldInfo ContactProperties for packed agricultural terrain with a coulombFriction of 0.7 and softness of 0.001. Save the world to /home/ga/Desktop/pioneer_terrain.wbt.

natural_language.prompt:
You are a field robotics engineer and a Pioneer 3-AT robot simulation world is loaded in Webots. The physics configuration is wrong and needs to be corrected before running terrain navigation experiments.

1. In the scene tree, find the 'PIONEER_ROBOT' robot node, then expand it to find its Physics sub-node. Change the mass field from its current wrong value to 12.5 (kg), which matches the actual Pioneer 3-AT robot mass specification.

2. Add a ContactProperties node to the world to define wheel-terrain contact dynamics. In the scene tree, click on the 'WorldInfo' node and look for a way to add a ContactProperties entry (or look in the world's physics settings). Set coulombFriction to 0.7 and softness to 0.001 for the wheel-terrain interaction.

3. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/pioneer_terrain.wbt using File > Save World As.
